mdRecord.dcterms:title: Harrison D. Reed Cemetery
mdRecord.dcterms:description:
This cemetery is in an open field on a hill 420 yards in front of 4064 Alum Ridge Rd. NW( the Mitchell Dairy Farm). It is accessed thru a gate just below the entrance to Pleasant Valley Church of the Brethren . You must go thru an additional gate to access the field.
N 36 56.808' W80 26.747'
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Lists
Cemeteries
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
